issue_summary: Make postings APIs expose raw impacts rather than scores.
javadoc_before:

 * Extension of {@link PostingsEnum} which also provides information about the
 * produced scores.
 * @lucene.experimental
 */
javadoc_after:

 * Extension of {@link PostingsEnum} which also provides information about
 * upcoming impacts.
 * @lucene.experimental
 */
